title: Visiting a Friend in Hospital 住院探望
scene: Lily去医院探望住院的同学Mike。

lines.en: Hi, Mike! How are you feeling today?
lines.zh: 嗨，迈克！你今天感觉怎么样？

lines.en: Much better, Lily. Thank you for coming!
I brought you some fruits and a book.
lines.zh: 我给你带了些水果和一本书。

lines.en: That is so nice of you! I was bored in here.
lines.zh: 你真好！我在这里好无聊。

lines.en: The doctor says maybe in three days.
That is not too long. We all miss you at school.
lines.zh: 不算太长。学校里大家都很想你。

lines.en: I miss you all too. How is the homework?
lines.zh: 我也想你们。作业怎么样？

lines.en: Do not worry about homework. Just get well!
Thank you, Lily. You are a true friend!
lines.zh: 谢谢你，莉莉。你真是好朋友！
